subject: Re: One more day....
body:
yes

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, April 30, 2007 8:21:56 AM
Subject: One more day....


Big Hello!

Are you back in town?  Tomorrow is May 1st......not sure if I will be 100% 
within 24 hours but well on my way.  If you are in town this week I'd love 
to see you so I can tell you all about how I'm adapting and the intense 
roller coaster ride I seem to still be on.  I'm trying to remember what Dr. 
Seligman suggested that I do.  Do you remember by chance?

Of course it is that time again, rent time.  I lack roughly $1000 to make it 
today.  May I borrow the funds or have Bella advance me from my next weeks 
check?  THANK YOU!!!

Hope to see you very soon!

Catherine

body_html:
yes
